content_body: We have had the relaxing, escape we ordered this Easter weekend! What a beautiful spot - even better than the pictures! Our first time to Blue Ridge did not disappoint. It reminds us of the beautiful areas around our part of Australia on the east coast and south of Sydney. Delicious dinner and live music at the Cristy Lee's Courtyard Grill in town (Blue Ridge Brewery was booked out - oops!). Lovely walk down to the river from the house, and what a view from the hot tub! Off to horse ride in Tennessee on our way home. Thanks for making our stay here so beautiful!
title: First Time to Blue Ridge, GA did not Disappoint
